creator: supraexpress@globaleyes.net
text:
Applying :S to " -e s!%%XSERVVERSION=xorg-server-1.4_1,1!g  -e s!%%xorg-server-1.4_3,1!g  -e s!%%XLIBVERSION=libGL-7.0.1!g  -e s!%%LINUXBASE=/compat/linux!g  -e s!%%SHLIB_VERSION=100.14.19!g  -e s!%%MODULESDIR=lib/xorg/modules!g  -e s!%%XORG=""!g  -e s!%%XFREE86="@comment "!g  -e s!%%LINUX=""!g  -e s!%%OSREL=6.3!g  -e s!%%PREFIX=%D!g  -e s!%%LOCALBASE=/usr/local!g  -e s!%%X11BASE=/usr/local!g  -e s!%%PORTDOCS=""!g  -e s!%%PORTEXAMPLES=""!g  -e s!%%PORTDATA=""!g  -e s!%%LIB32DIR=lib!g  -e s!%%XAWVER=8!g  -e s!%%PERL_VERSION=5.8.8!g  -e s!%%PERL_VER=5.8.8!g  -e s!%%PERL_ARCH=mach!g  -e s!%%SITE_PERL=lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8!g  -e s!%%DOCSDIR="share/doc/NVIDIA_GLX-1.0"!g  -e s!%%EXAMPLESDIR="share/examples/nvidia-driver"!g  -e s!%%DATADIR="share/nvidia-driver"!g  -e s!%%WWWDIR="www/nvidia-driver"!g  -e s!%%ETCDIR="etc/nvidia-driver"!g"

Result is "-e s!%%XSERVVERSION%%!xorg-server-1.4_1,1!g -e s!%%xorg-server-1.4_3,1!g -e s!%%XLIBVERSION%%!libGL-7.0.1!g -e s!%%LINUXBASE%%!/compat/linux!g -e s!%%SHLIB_VERSION%%!100.14.19!g -e s!%%MODULESDIR%%!lib/xorg/modules!g -e s!%%XORG%%!""!g -e s!%%XFREE86%%!"@comment "!g -e s!%%LINUX%%!""!g -e s!%%OSREL%%!6.3!g -e s!%%PREFIX%%!%D!g -e s!%%LOCALBASE%%!/usr/local!g -e s!%%X11BASE%%!/usr/local!g -e s!%%PORTDOCS%%!""!g -e s!%%PORTEXAMPLES%%!""!g -e s!%%PORTDATA%%!""!g -e s!%%LIB32DIR%%!lib!g -e s!%%XAWVER%%!8!g -e s!%%PERL_VERSION%%!5.8.8!g -e s!%%PERL_VER%%!5.8.8!g -e s!%%PERL_ARCH%%!mach!g -e s!%%SITE_PERL%%!lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8!g -e s!%%DOCSDIR%%!"share/doc/NVIDIA_GLX-1.0"!g -e s!%%EXAMPLESDIR%%!"share/examples/nvidia-driver"!g -e s!%%DATADIR%%!"share/nvidia-driver"!g -e s!%%WWWDIR%%!"www/nvidia-driver"!g -e s!%%ETCDIR%%!"etc/nvidia-driver"!g"

if [ -f /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver/pkg-plist ]; then  /usr/bin/sed -e s!%%XSERVVERSION%%!xorg-server-1.4_1,1!g -e s!%%xorg-server-1.4_3,1!g -e s!%%XLIBVERSION%%!libGL-7.0.1!g -e s!%%LINUXBASE%%!/compat/linux!g -e s!%%SHLIB_VERSION%%!100.14.19!g -e s!%%MODULESDIR%%!lib/xorg/modules!g -e s!%%XORG%%!""!g -e s!%%XFREE86%%!"@comment "!g -e s!%%LINUX%%!""!g -e s!%%OSREL%%!6.3!g -e s!%%PREFIX%%!%D!g -e s!%%LOCALBASE%%!/usr/local!g -e s!%%X11BASE%%!/usr/local!g -e s!%%PORTDOCS%%!""!g -e s!%%PORTEXAMPLES%%!""!g -e s!%%PORTDATA%%!""!g -e s!%%LIB32DIR%%!lib!g -e s!%%XAWVER%%!8!g -e s!%%PERL_VERSION%%!5.8.8!g -e s!%%PERL_VER%%!5.8.8!g -e s!%%PERL_ARCH%%!mach!g -e s!%%SITE_PERL%%!lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8!g -e s!%%DOCSDIR%%!"share/doc/NVIDIA_GLX-1.0"!g -e s!%%EXAMPLESDIR%%!"share/examples/nvidia-driver"!g -e s!%%DATADIR%%!"share/nvidia-driver"!g -e s!%%WWWDIR%%!"www/nvidia-driver"!g -e s!%%ETCDIR%%!"etc/nvidia-driver"!g /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver/pkg-plist >> /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-dri
 ver/work/.PLIST.mktmp;  fi

sed: 1: "s!%%xorg-server-1.4_3,1!g
": unescaped newline inside substitute pattern
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver.

Stop in /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver.
